body: Amara, hope the week is treating you well — wanted to reach out because I've been watching the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) portfolio with a lot of admiration lately, particularly the moves you've been making in climate infrastructure. I've been advising a small team out of Austin that's building grid-edge software for distributed energy resources, pre-seed stage but with some genuinely impressive early traction, and I immediately thought of you when they started talking about their raise. Would love to set up a brief intro call if you have bandwidth in the next couple of weeks — I think this one sits squarely in your sweet spot. Let me know what works on your end, and as always it's great to have an excuse to reconnect.
